holdings.infoBox: NFLY is an equity ETF with a total of 15 individual holdings.

overview.description: The YieldMax NFLX Option Income Strategy ETF (NFLY) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in communication services equity. The fund seeks to provide current income and capped gains on the Netflix stock (NFLX) through a synthetic covered call strategy, collateralized by cash and US Treasurys. The actively managed fund uses both standardized exchange-traded and FLEX options. NFLY was launched on Aug 7, 2023 and is issued by YieldMax.
